proofs.observation: Gasoline 95 and 2T engine oil prepared for refueling grass cutting equipment prior to routine vegetation maintenance activities.
Two-stroke fuel mixture prepared using approximately 500 cc of gasoline with one cap of 2T engine oil for grass cutting equipment operation.
Prepared fuel mixture transferred into the fuel tank of the grass cutting equipment before vegetation maintenance activities.
Grass condition within HZ-02 observed prior to cutting. Vegetation remained present before routine maintenance activities commenced.
Area observed following completion of grass cutting activities. Vegetation had been reduced, improving accessibility throughout the maintained operational area.
